mapper.sql: select '1' pzbh, '1' as flbh, left(hkpch, 4) kjn, cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) as kjqj, 'JZ->记账' pzlx, concat(substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '-', lpad(substring(hkpch, 5, 2), 2, '0'), '-', lpad(substring(hkpch, 7, 2), 2, '0')) as pzrq, '财' as kjtx, case when right(hkpch, 1) = '1' then concat('收', substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '年', cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) - 1, '月', '基层工会经费') when right(hkpch, 1) = '2' then concat('收', substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '年', cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) - 1, '月', '基层工会经费', '--', '（补结算）') else null end as zy, '10202->集中户' kjkmm, case when substring(hkpch, 1, 6) >= '202502' then sum(szje) else sum(hjje) end as jfje, null dfje, '4' fjzs, null ysdh, null zt, '彭雪皎' zdr, null shr, null jzr, null zfcbwz, null zbtx, null ysly, null wldw, null bm, null ry, null bmysjjfl, null zfgnfl, null zclx, null jfly, '02->非专项资金' zjxz, null zfysjjfl, null mxkm, null zffs, null xm, null jsfs, '0000->甘肃省总工会' as xjgh, null xmhd, null ggjcss, null jfsl, null dfsl, null dj from szqzdzzc t

select '1' pzbh, row_number() over () + 1 as flbh, left(hkpch, 4) kjn, cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) as kjqj, 'JZ->记账' pzlx, concat(substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '-', lpad(substring(hkpch, 5, 2), 2, '0'), '-', lpad(substring(hkpch, 7, 2), 2, '0')) as pzrq, '财' as kjtx, case when right(hkpch, 1) = '1' then concat('收', substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '年', cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) - 1, '月', '基层工会经费', '--', dwmc) when right(hkpch, 1) = '2' then concat('收', substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '年', cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) - 1, '月', '基层工会经费', '--', dwmc, '（补结算）') else null end as zy, '40202->税务代收工会经费' kjkmm, null as jfje, case when substring(hkpch, 1, 6) >= '202502' then szje else hjje end as dfje, '4' fjzs, null ysdh, null zt, '彭雪皎' zdr, null shr, null jzr, null zfcbwz, null zbtx, null ysly, null wldw, null bm, null ry, null bmysjjfl, null zfgnfl, null zclx, null jfly, '02->非专项资金' zjxz, null zfysjjfl, null mxkm, null zffs, null xm, null jsfs, (select a.dict_label from sys_dict_data a where a.dict_value = t.dwdm and a.dict_type = 'sys_xjgh') xjgh, null xmhd, null ggjcss, null jfsl, null dfsl, null dj from szqzdzzc t

select '1' pzbh, '1' as flbh, left(hkpch, 4) kjn, cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) as kjqj, 'JZ->记账' pzlx, concat(substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '-', lpad(substring(hkpch, 5, 2), 2, '0'), '-', lpad(substring(hkpch, 7, 2), 2, '0')) as pzrq, '财' as kjtx, case when right(hkpch, 1) = '1' then concat('收', substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '年', cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) - 1, '月', '应缴全总工会经费分成') when right(hkpch, 1) = '2' then concat('收', substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '年', cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) - 1, '月', '应缴全总工会经费分成', '--', '（补结算）') else null end as zy, '10202->集中户' kjkmm, case when substring(hkpch, 1, 6) >= '202502' then sum(qzje) else sum(hjje) end as jfje, null dfje, '4' fjzs, null ysdh, null zt, '彭雪皎' zdr, null shr, null jzr, null zfcbwz, null zbtx, null ysly, null wldw, null bm, null ry, null bmysjjfl, null zfgnfl, null zclx, null jfly, '02->非专项资金' zjxz, null zfysjjfl, null mxkm, null zffs, null xm, null jsfs, '0000->甘肃省总工会' as xjgh, null xmhd, null ggjcss, null jfsl, null dfsl, null dj from szqzdzzc t

select '1' pzbh, row_number() over () + 1 as flbh, left(hkpch, 4) kjn, cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) as kjqj, 'JZ->记账' pzlx, concat(substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '-', lpad(substring(hkpch, 5, 2), 2, '0'), '-', lpad(substring(hkpch, 7, 2), 2, '0')) as pzrq, '财' as kjtx, case when right(hkpch, 1) = '1' then concat('收', substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '年', cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) - 1, '月', '应缴全总工会经费分成') when right(hkpch, 1) = '2' then concat('收', substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '年', cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) - 1, '月', '应缴全总工会经费分成', '--', '（补结算）') else null end as zy, '211->应付上级经费' kjkmm, null as jfje, case when substring(hkpch, 1, 6) >= '202502' then sum(qzje) else sum(hjje) end as dfje, '4' fjzs, null ysdh, null zt, '彭雪皎' zdr, null shr, null jzr, null zfcbwz, null zbtx, null ysly, null wldw, null bm, null ry, null bmysjjfl, null zfgnfl, null zclx, null jfly, '02->非专项资金' zjxz, null zfysjjfl, null mxkm, null zffs, null xm, null jsfs, '0000->甘肃省总工会' as xjgh, null xmhd, null ggjcss, null jfsl, null dfsl, null dj from szqzdzzc t

select '1' pzbh, '1' as flbh, left(hkpch, 4) kjn, cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) as kjqj, 'JZ->记账' pzlx, concat(substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '-', lpad(substring(hkpch, 5, 2), 2, '0'), '-', lpad(substring(hkpch, 7, 2), 2, '0')) as pzrq, '财' as kjtx, case when right(hkpch, 1) = '1' then concat('收', substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '年', cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) - 1, '月', '属地工会经费') when right(hkpch, 1) = '2' then concat('收', substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '年', cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) - 1, '月', '属地工会经费', '--', '（补结算）') else null end as zy, '10202->集中户' kjkmm, sum(sdghje) jfje, null dfje, '4' fjzs, null ysdh, null zt, '彭雪皎' zdr, null shr, null jzr, null zfcbwz, null zbtx, null ysly, null wldw, null bm, null ry, null bmysjjfl, null zfgnfl, null zclx, null jfly, '02->非专项资金' zjxz, null zfysjjfl, null mxkm, null zffs, null xm, null jsfs, '0000->甘肃省总工会' as xjgh, null xmhd, null ggjcss, null jfsl, null dfsl, null dj from hyjfcx t

select '1' pzbh, row_number() over () + 1 as flbh, left(hkpch, 4) kjn, cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) as kjqj, 'JZ->记账' pzlx, concat(substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '-', lpad(substring(hkpch, 5, 2), 2, '0'), '-', lpad(substring(hkpch, 7, 2), 2, '0')) as pzrq, '财' as kjtx, case when right(hkpch, 1) = '1' then concat('收', substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '年', cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) - 1, '月', '属地工会经费', '--', nsrmc) when right(hkpch, 1) = '2' then concat('收', substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '年', cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) - 1, '月', '属地工会经费', '--', nsrmc, '（补结算）') else null end as zy, '40202->税务代收工会经费' kjkmm, null as jfje, sdghje dfje, '4' fjzs, null ysdh, null zt, '彭雪皎' zdr, null shr, null jzr, null zfcbwz, null zbtx, null ysly, null wldw, null bm, null ry, null bmysjjfl, null zfgnfl, null zclx, null jfly, '02->非专项资金' zjxz, null zfysjjfl, null mxkm, null zffs, null xm, null jsfs, (select a.dict_label from sys_dict_data a where a.dict_value = t.dwdm and a.dict_type = 'sys_xjgh') xjgh, null xmhd, null ggjcss, null jfsl, null dfsl, null dj from hyjfcx t

select '1' pzbh, '1' as flbh, left(hkpch, 4) kjn, cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) as kjqj, 'JZ->记账' pzlx, concat(substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '-', lpad(substring(hkpch, 5, 2), 2, '0'), '-', lpad(substring(hkpch, 7, 2), 2, '0')) as pzrq, '财' as kjtx, case when right(hkpch, 1) = '1' then concat('收', substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '年', cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) - 1, '月', '工会经费行业分成') when right(hkpch, 1) = '2' then concat('收', substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '年', cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) - 1, '月', '工会经费行业分成', '--', '（补结算）') else null end as zy, '10201->银行存款/交通银行兰州分行第一支行' kjkmm, sum(hyghje) jfje, null dfje, '4' fjzs, null ysdh, null zt, '彭雪皎' zdr, null shr, null jzr, null zfcbwz, null zbtx, null ysly, null wldw, null bm, null ry, null bmysjjfl, null zfgnfl, null zclx, null jfly, '02->非专项资金' zjxz, null zfysjjfl, null mxkm, null zffs, null xm, null jsfs, (select a.dict_label from sys_dict_data a where a.dict_value = t.dwdm and a.dict_type = 'sys_xjgh') xjgh, null xmhd, null ggjcss, null jfsl, null dfsl, null dj from hyjfcx t

select '1' pzbh, row_number() over () + 1 as flbh, left(hkpch, 4) kjn, cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) as kjqj, 'JZ->记账' pzlx, concat(substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '-', lpad(substring(hkpch, 5, 2), 2, '0'), '-', lpad(substring(hkpch, 7, 2), 2, '0')) as pzrq, '财' as kjtx, case when right(hkpch, 1) = '1' then concat('收', substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '年', cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) - 1, '月', '工会经费行业分成', '--', nsrmc) when right(hkpch, 1) = '2' then concat('收', substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '年', cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) - 1, '月', '工会经费行业分成', '--', nsrmc, '（补结算）') else null end as zy, '402->拨缴经费收入' kjkmm, null as jfje, hyghje dfje, '4' fjzs, null ysdh, null zt, '彭雪皎' zdr, null shr, null jzr, null zfcbwz, null zbtx, null ysly, null wldw, null bm, null ry, null bmysjjfl, null zfgnfl, null zclx, null jfly, '02->非专项资金' zjxz, null zfysjjfl, null mxkm, null zffs, null xm, null jsfs, (select a.dict_label from sys_dict_data a where a.dict_value = t.djxh and a.dict_type = 'sys_xjgh') xjgh, null xmhd, null ggjcss, null jfsl, null dfsl, null dj from hyjfcx t

select '1' pzbh, '1' as flbh, left(hkpch, 4) kjn, cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) as kjqj, 'JZ->记账' pzlx, concat(substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '-', lpad(substring(hkpch, 5, 2), 2, '0'), '-', lpad(substring(hkpch, 7, 2), 2, '0')) as pzrq, '财' as kjtx, case when right(hkpch, 1) = '1' then concat('收', substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '年', cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) - 1, '月', '应返基层筹备金') when right(hkpch, 1) = '2' then concat('收', substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '年', cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) - 1, '月', '应返基层筹备金', '（补结算）') else null end as zy, '10202->集中户' kjkmm, sum(je) jfje, null dfje, '4' fjzs, null ysdh, null zt, '彭雪皎' zdr, null shr, null jzr, null zfcbwz, null zbtx, null ysly, null wldw, null bm, null ry, null bmysjjfl, null zfgnfl, null zclx, null jfly, '02->非专项资金' zjxz, null zfysjjfl, null mxkm, null zffs, null xm, null jsfs, '0000->甘肃省总工会' as xjgh, null xmhd, null ggjcss, null jfsl, null dfsl, null dj from cbjjzxx t

select '1' pzbh, row_number() over () + 1 as flbh, left(hkpch, 4) kjn, cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) as kjqj, 'JZ->记账' pzlx, concat(substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '-', lpad(substring(hkpch, 5, 2), 2, '0'), '-', lpad(substring(hkpch, 7, 2), 2, '0')) as pzrq, '财' as kjtx, case when right(hkpch, 1) = '1' then concat('收', substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '年', cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) - 1, '月', '应返基层筹备金', '--', dwmc) when right(hkpch, 1) = '2' then concat('收', substring(hkpch, 1, 4), '年', cast(substring(hkpch, 5, 2) as unsigned) - 1, '月', '应返基层筹备金', '--', dwmc, '（补结算）') else null end as zy, '21203->应付建会筹备金' kjkmm, null as jfje, sum(je) dfje, '4' fjzs, null ysdh, null zt, '彭雪皎' zdr, null shr, null jzr, null zfcbwz, null zbtx, null ysly, null wldw, null bm, null ry, null bmysjjfl, null zfgnfl, null zclx, null jfly, '02->非专项资金' zjxz, null zfysjjfl, null mxkm, null zffs, null xm, null jsfs, (select a.dict_label from sys_dict_data a where a.dict_value = t.sjdm and a.dict_type = 'sys_xjgh') xjgh, null xmhd, null ggjcss, null jfsl, null dfsl, null dj from cbjjzxx t
